# EKA Balance - Teràpies Somàtiques i Integratives
> Holistic somatic therapies and integrative wellness services in Barcelona.

# Services

## [360 Revision](https://ekabalance.com/360-revision)
> Comprehensive assessment of your physical and emotional state.
- Focus: Posture, tension, emotional balance.
- Duration: 90 min

## [Somatic Massage](https://ekabalance.com/services/massage)
> Deep tissue work with somatic awareness.
- Techniques: Deep Tissue, Myofascial Release, Trigger Point.
- Benefits: Pain relief, relaxation, improved mobility.

## [Kinesiologia](https://ekabalance.com/services/kinesiology)
> Holistic approach to identify and correct imbalances.
- Focus: Structural, chemical, emotional.
- Method: Muscle testing.

## [Movement Lesson / JKA](https://ekabalance.com/technique)
> Neuro-developmental movement therapy.
- Based on: Feldenkrais, Jeremy Krauss Approach (JKA).
- Benefits: Developmental delays, special needs, improved coordination.

## [Nutrition](https://ekabalance.com/services/nutrition)
> Personalized nutritional guidance.
- Focus: Gut health, inflammation, energy levels.

# About Elena Kucherova
> Certified therapist specializing in somatic integration.
- Expertise: Kinesiology, Massage Therapy, JKA/Movement Lesson.
- Location: Barcelona, Spain.
- Languages: English, Spanish, Catalan, Russian.

# Contact & Booking
- Website: https://ekabalance.com
- Booking: https://ekabalance.com/booking
- Contact: https://ekabalance.com/contact
